title: platanthera mandarinorum subsp. winkleriana
intro: Platanthera mandarinorum subsp. winkleriana, commonly known as Winkler's platanthera, is a subspecies of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Winkler's platanthera include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Winkler's platanthera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
